lines.speaker: Robert Boss
lines.text: Talk to the tree, make friends with it.

lines.speaker: Robert Boss
lines.text: You can do anything you want to do. This is your world.

lines.speaker: Robert Boss
lines.text: I'll give him a friend! Like I always say, everyone needs a friend!

lines.speaker: Robert Boss
lines.text: Well of course! Right after I finish this painting.

lines.speaker: Robert Boss
lines.text: I don't make mistakes, just happy accidents.
